theme_and_archetype.description: An executive-grade, magazine-like aesthetic targeting CEOs and CLOs. It avoids the typical 'SaaS tech' look, opting instead for a warm, authoritative, and distinctive editorial style with asymmetric layouts, large display typography, and intentional negative space.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-text_primary
hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-brand_accent

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetric grids (e.g., col-span-5 and col-span-7 pairings) rather than equal halves. Use negative space aggressively.

motion_specs.scroll_reveal: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }}, whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}, viewport={{ once: true, margin: '-100px' }}
motion_specs.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for the Fortune 500 client logos (GE, Aviva, Rio Tinto, HCL) and credential badges. Slow, continuous drift.
motion_specs.hover_effects: Subtle image scaling (scale 1.05) inside overflow-hidden containers. Minimal lift (-translate-y-1) for cards.

navigation.style: Sticky crystal glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background_primary/80) with 1px bottom border. Desktop: Logo left, Links center, CTA right.
navigation.cta_button: Solid brand_accent background, text-white, sharp corners or slightly rounded (rounded-sm), text-sm uppercase tracking-wide.

footer.style: Dark surface (#222222) to create dramatic end-of-page contrast. Huge typography for 'Let's Talk'.
footer.content: Links, Socials (LinkedIn, Instagram), Newsletter signup minimal input field.

contact_form.styling: Editorial form fields. No background, just a solid bottom border (border-b border-text_primary/30) that turns brand_accent on focus. Large text inputs.

case_study_card.layout: Image on top (aspect-video, grayscale to color on hover), Title, thick brand_accent top border, key metrics (eSAT/cSAT) highlighted in bold typography.

pillar_card.layout: Large background number (01, 02, 03) overlapping text. Clean border, lots of internal padding (p-10). Heading in serif, body in sans.

sections: Hero: High-impact H1 value prop 'Transforming Underperforming Enterprises into High-Performing Ones'. No typical tech illustration; use a sophisticated, dark editorial photo with text overlay.
Marquee: Fortune 500 client logos (text-based if logos unavailable: GE, Aviva, Rio Tinto, HCL) moving slowly.
The KiraFix Model: 3 pillars (Innovation, Modern Learning, AI) in an asymmetric bento grid.
Founder Spotlight: Seema Bassi photo on one side, bio and 'Top 10 CLO' credentials on the other. Large quote styling.
Case Studies Preview: 2 featured transformation stories highlighting eSAT/cSAT lift.
Hero: Large portrait of Seema Bassi, oversized serif heading.
Biography: 25 years Fortune 500 experience, EdTech SDSU, IIMB Women Start-up.
Media/Features: IWD feature image, Masterclass screenshot.
Philosophy: Text-heavy, editorial layout with drop caps and wide margins.
Deep Dive: 3 Pillars detailed with abstract tech/office imagery.
Services List: Fractional CLO, L&D Turnarounds, Scalable Content Strategy, Performance Consulting (Accordion or staggered list).
Grid: Detailed metrics cards showing ROI, eSAT, cSAT improvements.
Insights: Link to CEO Magazine feature and articles.
Layout: Split screen. Left: Large text 'Let's transform your organization.', Contact info. Right: The Discovery Call form.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Cormorant Garamond and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layout structures; avoid Shadcn layout cards as they restrict editorial freedom. Use Shadcn only for complex interactive parts (forms, dialogs).
Install react-fast-marquee for the client logo strip.
Install framer-motion for scroll reveals and ensure all motion is smooth and premium.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.
Implement the Contact form with a backend connection to MongoDB to store Discovery Call submissions.
Ensure images have appropriate object-cover and aspect ratios so they don't break the bento grids.
Use lucide-react for iconography, keeping stroke weights light (1.5 or 1) to match the editorial feel.
